case_title: MATOZA, COSMEDIN vs. MOKREY, ROBERT et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MATOZA, COSMEDIN AS TO DEFENDANT MOKREY, ROBERT DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          AUG-14-1998 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-15-1998 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       JUL-27-1998

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF AUG-14-1998, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), TO OBTAIN ANSWER OR DEFAULT. OSC TO PLTF'S ATTORNEY GEORGE J ENGLER HEARING SET FOR SEP-23-1998 AT 02:30 PM IN DEPT 212 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE

OSC CALENDAR OF SEP-23-1998, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN ANSWER OR DEFAULT; OSC TO PLTF'S ATTORNEY ENGLER GEORGE J HEARING SET FOR NOV-04-1998 AT 02:30 PM IN DEPT 212 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
SANCTION PAYMENT DEPOSITED BY PLAINTIFF MATOZA, COSMEDIN

OSC CALENDAR OF FEB-17-1999, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN ANSWER FROM OR ENTER DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT. OSC TO PLTF'S ATTY GEORGE J ENGLER. HEARING SET FOR MAR-31-1999 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 212 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF NOV-04-1998, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $100.00 FOR FAILURE TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), TO OBTAIN ANSWER FROM OR ENTER DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT. OSC AND SANCTION AGAINST PLTF'S ATTY GEORGE J ENGLER, WHO IS REQUIRED TO FILE STATUS STATEMENT 20 DAYS PRIOR TO HEARING., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE NOV-19-1998 CONTINUED FROM NOV-04-1998 TO JAN-06-1999 AT 01:30 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF JAN-06-1999, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE OBTAIN ANSWER AND OR ENTER DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT OSC TO PLTF'S ATTORNEY GEORGE J ENGLER HEARING SET FOR FEB-17-1999 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 212 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
